scripts.collect: npx tsc -p ../shared/tsconfig.json && npm run build && npx tsx src/collect_data.ts
scripts.record: npx tsc -p ../shared/tsconfig.json && npm run build && npx tsx src/record_replay.ts
scripts.replay: cd ../client && npm run build 2>/dev/null; cd ../trainer && npx tsx src/replay_picker.ts
scripts.test_replay: cd ../client && npm run build 2>/dev/null; cd ../trainer && npx tsx src/test_replay_picker.ts
